verses.text: Ka ta aw, na lawmte khatpeuh in sum leitawi a lak ciangin a lohzawh kei leh ama tangin a lohsak dingin kam na ciamkha hiam
Na kampauna hangin nang hong kimanin, na thuciamna hangin na awkkha hiam
Ka ta aw, tua bang na hih khak leh, tua mipa' khutsungah a om na hi hi. Na suahtak theihna dingin manlangin a kiangah pai in la, hong khahna dingin ama kiangah thum in
Ihmumu kei in la, om mawkmawk kei in
Sabengpa' kiang panin a suahtakna dingin sakhi a tai bangin, thangah a awk vasa a kitom bangin na suahtakna dingin hanciam in
Thadahpa aw, miksite kiangah pai in la, amau' nuntakzia va en in
Amaute in a uk ding leh a makai ding kuamah neilo napi-in
khuakhal sungin a nek ding uh, tuk hun sungin kaikhawm khol uh hi
Thadahpa aw, bang tanvei lumlum ding a, cik ciangin thokhia ding na hi hiam
Tawmkhat sung mengme lai ning, na cih kikalin
zawn'na leh cihmawhna in migilo gutate bangin nang hong sugawp pak ding hi
Miginalo, a ginlo pa, thuzuau genin vak kawikawi a
nang hong khemnop manin a mitheek hong pia-in, a khe tawh hong su-in a khut tawh hong khoih hi
A lungsimah thusia bekbek ngaihsun niloh a, a omna peuhah buaina a piangsak hi
Tua ahih manin theihkholh lohin ama tungah lungkhamna tung ding a, bawlkikzawh nawnloh dongin siatna ngah ding hi
Topa in a muhdah, a khahkhong ngeiloh ding, thu guk, tua zah bek hilo, thu sagih tak om a, tuate pen
kihihsakna, zuauthu genna, mawhneilo mi thahna
thusia bawl ding ngaihsutna, gamtatsiat ding a manlangte
zuauthu gen teci manlote, leh kitotna a piangsakte ahi hi.
Ka ta aw, na pa' hong gen bangin gamta in la, na nu' hong thuhilhnate mangngilh kei in
Amau' hong thugente phawk tawntung in la, na lungsimah ciamteh niloh in
Tua thute in na paina peuhah lam hong lak ding a, zanin na ihmut kalin nang hong cing ding a, sunin na hah sungin na gamtatna ding hong hilh ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh thukham leh a hilhnate pen a taang mahmah khuavak bang hi a, khalna leh hilhnate pen nuntakna ding lampi hi a
mi' zi tawh na mawhlohna dingin nang hong kemin, kam khum zangin a hong zol numei ginalote kiang panin nang hong hu ding hi
Amau' melhoihna iplahkha kei in la, amau' hong zawlmitna khenglahkha kei in
Bang hang hiam cih leh anlum khat tawh numei paktat khat kingahzo a, ahi zongin numei tawh mawhna in nuntakna bup siasak hi
Na ang sungah meikuang pom lecin na puan kangloin om ding ahi hiam
Mei-am tung tawnin pai lecin na khe kangloin om ding ahi hiam
Tua mah bangin mi' zi tawh a mawhte in gimna thuak ding uh a, tua bang a gamta peuhmah in gimna thuak ding uh hi
A gilkial a cimawh mi khat in na a guk ciangin, midangte in mawhsak lualo napi
amah kiman leh a zah sagihin kilohsak a, a neih khempeuh a piak kul hi
Ahi zongin numei tawh a mawhte pen thu ngaihsun theilo mi hi a, amau leh amau a kisusiatawm ahi uh hi
Mawhna a bawl mi in satgawpna thuak ding a, a min sia-in mindai paisuak ding hi
A numei' pasal a hehzawk theihna ding thudang om nawnlo a, a heh thukna-ah khawl hun cih nei theilo hi
Amah in sumlepai sang nuam vetlo a, letsong tampi piakna in a hehna damsak zolo hi.
